text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the URA Finale final race, Trainer Kiryuin
and I meet and lock eyes, ready to face off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words echo the spirit and passion of our two
rivals who have overcome countless hurdles to
make it to this point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the URA Finale is about to
begin!
